productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Grey T-Shirts
description: Composition Light grey round neck t-shirt, made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has three-quarter set-in sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Get retro and return to the era of Old england with this united colors of benetton t-shirt. The fabric falls neatly around your torso enhancing your feminine style, while the three-quarter set-in sleeves contour your toned arms perfectly, keeping the mild cold winds at bay. Pair this with jeans and sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirt Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
